name: Pitchfork
philosophy: Raw, loud, bold black-on-white music criticism. The 0.0-10.0 score numeral at 96-160px is the brand. Heavy industrial sans display against serif body. 90s zine made the journey to the web without losing edge.

design_language.motion_signature: None on hover beyond 100ms link color shift. Score reveal on review page scales 98%-100% over 300ms — the only branded motion moment.

trademark_signals: 0.0-10.0 score numeral at 96-160px — most-recognized Pitchfork visual
Heavy industrial sans display — anti-elegant, anti-magazine
Album art as visual anchor, never decorative
Best New Music red badge — small, hot, reserved
Serif body against heavy sans display — the contrast is the brand
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a section-color system — monochrome plus one red
